text.title: AI-Generated Test Audit Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the filled-in audit checklist and the reviewer verdict.

field.name: items[].verdict_note
field.notes: required when verdict=flag, optional when pass/n/a

forbidden.pattern: overall_verdict = approve while any item has verdict = flag
items[].verdict = pass without the test files actually existing in the diff
checklist completed within < 3 minutes of PR-ready (rubber stamp signal)
items list contains fewer than 12 entries or duplicates an item_id
pre_lint_results indicates anti-patterns (excessive mocks, structural-only, missing failure cases) AND those items show verdict = pass

allowed-transformations.transformation: Mark an item n/a when the AC genuinely has no error path or no bounded input; n/a requires a one-line justification.
Group repair_request items into a single PR comment for the engineer when several are related.
Skip item 12 (mutation testing) when mutation-testing CI is not yet adopted; record the skip explicitly.

list.item: Reviewer spent at least 5-10 minutes walking the list (timestamp delta)
overall_verdict matches the worst per-item verdict (any flag blocks approve)
pre_lint_results were considered, not overridden silently
